description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface for grip and black channel lines dividing the ball into distinct panels. The ball features visible branding, including the Spalding logo and NBA insignia, along with the signature of the NBA commissioner, all printed in black. The surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible scuffs or dirt, indicating it is either new or lightly used. The ball is spherical and slightly compressible, designed for optimal bounce and handling during play. The black seams are recessed, providing tactile feedback and aiding in ball control. The overall appearance is consistent with professional basketballs used in urban parks, gyms, or street courts.
description: A classic orange basketball with black channel lines, textured surface, and visible Spalding and NBA branding. The ball is clean, spherical, and designed for grip and bounce.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basketball's orange surface and two prominent black channel lines curving horizontally.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical black seams and a partial glimpse of the Spalding logo and NBA branding.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the Spalding logo, NBA insignia, and commissioner's signature clearly printed on the ball.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical black seams and no visible branding or markings.
attribute_brand_logo: Spalding logo and NBA insignia visible on the upper panel in view 2.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with black recessed seams forming curved and straight segments.
